name: SS&C OCR Outbound
description: After fax poll: create Captricity batch → upload PDF (multipart) → submit. Invoked by case-automation.

pipeline.script: response = { batchName: (request.batchName || request.name || ('ecrm-' + Date.now())), name: (request.batchName || request.name || ('ecrm-' + Date.now())), workflowId: String(request.workflowId || request.workflow_id || '538'), fileName: (request.fileName || request.file_name || 'document.pdf'), communicationId: request.communicationId, hasFilePayload: !!(request.fileBase64 || request.file_base64 || request.s3Key || request.s3_key) };

pipeline.conditionScript: req.body.batchName && req.body.workflowId && (req.body.hasFilePayload || mainReq.body.fileBase64 || mainReq.body.file_base64 || mainReq.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3_key)

body.script: response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, name: req.body.batchName, workflowId: req.body.workflowId };

response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, name: req.body.name, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fileName: req.body.fileName, communicationId: req.body.communicationId, hasFilePayload: req.body.hasFilePayload, batchId: String((res && (res.batchId || res.id || (res.raw && res.raw.id))) || ''), createResponse: res };

response = { batchId: req.body.batchId, fileName: req.body.fileName || mainReq.body.fileName || 'document.pdf', fileBase64: mainReq.body.fileBase64 || mainReq.body.file_base64, s3Key: mainReq.body.s3Key || mainReq.body.s3_key, s3Bucket: mainReq.body.s3Bucket || mainReq.body.s3_bucket, contentType: mainReq.body.contentType || 'application/pdf', communicationId: req.body.communicationId || mainReq.body.communicationId };

response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fileName: req.body.fileName, communicationId: req.body.communicationId, batchId: req.body.batchId, uploaded: true, uploadResponse: res };

response = { batchName: req.body.batchName, workflowId: req.body.workflowId, fileName: req.body.fileName, communicationId: req.body.communicationId, batchId: req.body.batchId, uploaded: req.body.uploaded, submitted: true, submitResponse: res };

pipeline.script: response = { success: true, batchId: request.batchId, workflowId: request.workflowId, fileName: request.fileName, submitted: !!request.submitted };
